image:image.image:title: The Minister for Local Government and English Devolution attends an IfG conference
image:image.image:caption: 21/01/2025. London, United Kingdom. The Minister of State at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government, Jim McMahon, sits on a panel discussing ‘How to fix local government’ at the Institute for Government’s annual conference in central London. Picture by Simon Walker / Deputy Prime Minister's Office

image:image.image:title: The Minister of State in his office in Westminster
image:image.image:caption: 05/11/2024. London, United Kingdom. The Minister of State at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government, Jim McMahon in his office in Westminster. Picture by Simon Walker / Deputy Prime Minister's Office
